title: Fluctuating oestrogen levels may alter how drugs enter women's brains
description: Oestrogen levels fluctuate throughout a woman's menstrual cycle, which may impact how efficiently a drug that targets the brain can reach its destination
author: Starre Vartan

title: Hidden black hole could explain mystery at the heart of our galaxy
description: The area surrounding our galaxy’s central supermassive black hole contains three strangely different populations of stars – but one hidden black hole could explain all of them
author: Leah Crane

title: Huge crater in Australia may be the oldest impact structure on Earth
description: A study claims that the North Pole Dome crater in Western Australia was caused by an asteroid strike 3 billion years ago, but other researchers dispute the proposed age
author: James Woodford

title: You should turn off fans when it's too hot – but how hot is too hot?
description: Fans can make you hotter rather than cooler, but the temperature at which you should turn them off depends on several factors, including your age and the humidity level
author: Michael Le Page

title: Elite Maya people had teeth placed in a cave far from their tombs
description: A cave in Belize contains teeth from dozens of important Maya people buried elsewhere, which may attest to a ritual intended to ensure their passage to the underworld
author: Chris Simms

title: X's secretive plans to deliver cargo to Earth from space
description: Not much is known about Starfall, SpaceX's new delivery system, but an assessment published in May revealed its intended purpose
author: Alex Wilkins
